name: Add four-port input runtime and action compilation
description: Implement immutable per-frame controller snapshots, transitions, digital/axis mappings and chords, dead zones, consumption, action hashing/limits, safe binary timed rumble, project.p64proj parsing, and rom:/p64/input generation. Preserve direct libdragon access and backward compatibility. Verify with mocked host tests and native compile coverage.
result: Implemented immutable four-port snapshots, action/axis compilation, dead zones, consumption, connection transitions, and safe per-port rumble; covered by host/native tests and N64 builds.

name: Add persistent multiplayer session and player spawns
description: Implement the persistent 1-4 player Session state machine, configuration, player status/statistics, allocation-free callbacks, pause/reconnect flow, ties/tiebreaks, scoring/stocks/respawn/race APIs, scene persistence, and component 15 Player Spawn with deterministic team/player/neutral round-robin selection. Verify transition/team/tie/respawn tests.
result: Implemented persistent match/session state, teams, scores, stocks, respawns, races, tiebreaks, pause/reconnect, fixed callbacks, and deterministic Player Spawn component.

name: Add multiplayer CLI validation and mutation
description: Implement bf64 multiplayer status|validate with stable JSON/dry-run/record behavior, metadata/action/layout/HUD/spawn/RDRAM checks, scene attach player-spawn and multiplayer-aware Camera/UI options, and bf64 run --rdram 4|8 while retaining profile JSON compatibility. Verify CLI schemas and backward loading.
result: Added stable JSON multiplayer status/validate commands, scene mutation options, validation coverage, and 4/8 MB run/profile controls.

name: Add multiplayer reference examples and migrate engine input
description: Create n64/examples/multiplayer with lobby, arena, race, shared and split configurations; migrate engine-owned and existing example UI/debug controls to P64::Input without removing project access to libdragon.
result: Added arena/race shared and split-screen reference scenes, migrated engine-owned and existing example input, and added a four-port hardware probe ROM.

name: Extend cameras rendering UI and audio
description: Implement Manual/Shared/Player camera targets and layouts, five-bit view masks, player-targeted UI with independent focus/sourcePlayer/text ownership, split-aware multi-listener Audio3D, and profiling counters while preserving legacy/manual behavior and render pipelines. Verify layout/view/UI/audio tests.
result: Implemented shared/player cameras, adaptive viewports, object view masks, per-player UI focus/events/text ownership, multi-listener audio, and render profiling.

name: Build local four-player multiplayer layer
description: Implement the approved Binface64 local multiplayer plan across runtime input/session APIs, scene cameras/view masks/spawns/UI/audio, project compilation, CLI validation and mutation, editor support, reference examples, tests, and profiling. Preserve pre-existing uncommitted documentation/header edits and exclude generated Python caches. Done when host/native/CLI test coverage passes and the repository exposes backward-compatible 1-4 player behavior.
result: Delivered the complete local four-player layer across runtime, build pipeline, editor, CLI, examples, tests, profiling, and documentation. Automated acceptance gates pass; emulator performance and physical-controller checks remain documented external certification steps.

name: Integrate verify and document multiplayer feature
description: Run host/native/editor/CLI suites, fix regressions, validate packaging/docs/API surfaces, add profiling/sample commands and hardware/emulator acceptance documentation, preserve unrelated working-tree edits, and record limitations for hardware-only certification.
result: Verified 133 host tests plus 12 native subtests, zero-issue reference validation, editor build, adaptive ROM build, probe ROM build, and documented the APIs and external hardware gates.

name: Add editor multiplayer workspace and graph nodes
description: Add editor serialization parity, Multiplayer workspace for input/controller/layout/assignment editing and diagnostics, scene inspector Camera/UI/Player Spawn options, and input/action/session Node Graph nodes.
result: Added the Multiplayer editor workspace, scene diagnostics, camera/UI/spawn inspectors, project settings, and multiplayer Node Graph nodes.
